text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I daresay I have proved my imperial authority
beyond all doubt.
choice_data_list: Let's win the next one, too!
Let's win the next one, too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I daresay I have proved my imperial authority
beyond all doubt.
choice_data_list: Let's win the next one, too!
Let's win the next one, too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A-a reward?! I... I see... A reward...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me for being so taken aback. Respect
and gratitude, I am used to, but not... rewards.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You somehow always manage to confound
my expectations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But your sentiment is reward enough. I have no
need of gifts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
After all, what greater reward could there be than
the chance to vie with other Umamusume on the
track?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. This victory was but a single step
on my road to glory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is a long and arduous road, but I shall not rest
until I have reached the end.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And of course, you will accompany me every step
of the way.
